title: Senior Software Engineer (AI / LLM experienced)
company_stage: Late Stage (Public company customer base, recognized industry leader)
company_focus:
Continuous Threat Exposure Management combining agentic AI
with security researchers for vulnerability discovery and
remediation
description:
HackerOne is a global leader in Continuous Threat Exposure
Management (CTEM). The HackerOne Platform unites agentic AI
solutions with the ingenuity of the world’s largest
community of security researchers to continuously discover,
validate, prioritize, and remediate exposures across code,
cloud, and AI systems. Through solutions like bug bounty,
vulnerability disclosure, agentic pentesting, AI red
teaming, and code security, HackerOne delivers measurable,
continuous reduction of cyber risk for enterprises. Industry
leaders, including Anthropic, Crypto.com, General Motors,
Goldman Sachs, Lufthansa, Uber, UK Ministry of Defence, and
the U.S. Department of Defense, trust HackerOne to safeguard
their digital ecosystems. HackerOne was recognized in
Gartner’s Emerging Tech Impact Radar: AI Cybersecurity
Ecosystem report for its leadership in AI Security Testing
and has been named a Most Loved Workplace for Young
Professionals (2024).

HackerOne is at a pivotal inflection point in the security
industry. Offensive security is no longer optional – it is
the standard for forward-thinking companies that want to
build trust and resilience in a world where AI-driven
innovation and adversaries are moving faster than ever. With
the industry shifting, HackerOne stands apart: we combine
the ingenuity of the largest security research community
with a best-in-class AI-powered platform, trusted by the
world’s top organizations.

HackerOne Values

HackerOne is dedicated to fostering a strong and inclusive
culture. HackerOne is Customer Obsessed and prioritizes
customer outcomes in our decisions and actions. We Default
to Disclosure by operating with transparency and integrity,
ensuring trust and accountability. Employees, researchers,
customers, and partners Win Together by fostering
empowerment, inclusion, respect, and accountability.

Senior Software EngineerLocation : PuneWorking model : In
office

About Company

HackerOne is the trusted security partner for forward-
thinking organisations. We deliver proactive protection
through a unique blend of human intelligence and cutting-
edge AI. Our platform enables companies to continuously
discover and fix vulnerabilities across their entire digital
ecosystem before adversaries can exploit them.

At the heart of our approach is a deep commitment to
customer success. We combine the industry’s largest, most
skilled community of security researchers with a constantly
evolving AI-enhanced vulnerability database to deliver
actionable insights and measurable outcomes. Whether it’s
through bug bounty programs, AI-driven red teaming,
pentesting, agentic security workflows, or on-demand
security reviews, we help our customers embed security
throughout the software development lifecycle.

Our solutions are trusted by leaders across various
industries, including Coinbase, GitHub, Goldman Sachs,
PayPal, Hyatt, the U.S. Department of Defence, and more, who
rely on HackerOne to reduce risk and build secure, resilient
systems.

In recognition of our innovation and workplace culture, Fast
Company named us a Best Workplace for Innovators in 2023 and
a Most Loved Workplace for Young Professionals in 2024.

Position Summary

As a Software Engineer IV, you will work closely with the
team's senior engineers, Product Managers, and Designers.
You’ll also collaborate closely with our Pune in-office
Customer Operations team and teams in the Netherlands and
North America to solve real-world problems for our global
customers.

In this role, you will lead complex initiatives and own end-
to-end delivery of projects with moderate to large scope.
You anticipate delivery risks, align stakeholders early, and
maintain quality under tight timelines. Together with the
Senior Engineering Manager, you will develop excellent
capabilities to serve your customers by combining technical
depth with operational discipline, balancing scope, risk,
and speed, and surfacing trade-offs to enable informed
decisions.

HackerOne is investing in a CTEM roadmap that includes
agentic work. You will help drive the design and delivery of
AI-assisted and agentic capabilities that are measurable,
safe to operate, and tied to customer outcomes. You will
also raise the bar for platform health and influence
HackerOne’s engineering practices to accelerate execution.

You’ll combine your technological expertise, domain
knowledge, and an unquestionable dedication to business
objectives as you intersect with the engineering
organisation. You identify and make systematic improvements
to technical weaknesses you’ll find in your squad’s
codebases, and in shared codebases across the company.

What You Will Do

- Your first month will be spent getting to know our company
  and your fellow HackerOnies through our well-organised and
  fun onboarding process called H.A.T.C.H.
- You will set up your development environment, get a feel for
  our engineering processes, and embark on a journey to
  fully understand the domain you will be working with.
- By day 30, you will have met most of your fellow Engineering
  HackerOnies, paired with other Software Engineers,
  developed a strong understanding of our codebases and
  Security Management products, and be prepared to start
  hands-on coding.
- By day 60, you will be involved in building a meaningful
  part of one of the projects and will have become more
  connected with our community and various stakeholders.
- By day 90, you’ll have impressed your colleagues with your
  technical contributions and earned trust and credibility
  within your squad and the whole Engineering team by
  presenting your progress during our review/demo sessions.

Long term, you will:

- Lead complex initiatives as a project lead together with
  stakeholders, designers and product leaders
- Build, ship and maintain highly available, performant and
  durable features, focused on (but not limited to) hacker-
  facing areas of our platform
- Deliver key results for impactful objectives by balancing
  scope, risk, and speed - raising risks early and creating
  shared context for why the work matters against the team
  goals and roadmap
- Be a part of cross-squad initiatives and influence shared
  engineering practices to accelerate execution across teams
- Onboard, guide, mentor, and delegate effectively to
  engineers; build leverage by creating clarity, reusable
  patterns, and strong technical direction
- Lead CTEM and agentic work, including:
  - Owning architecture for agentic workflows (tool use/function
    calling, orchestration, retrieval/RAG, human-in-the-loop
    patterns)
  - Building and introducing AI tools that improve delivery
    efficiency and reduce repetitive work; challenging
    legacy solutions that slow velocity
  - Proactively leading adaptation during change: re-scoping
    tasks during direction pivots, aligning with Product,
    and surfacing trade-offs clearly to move decisions
    forward
  - Implementing data loops that enable continuous optimisation
    (quality metrics, capacity/latency/cost trade-offs,
    velocity signals, and post-launch monitoring)

Who are you

- At first, a tech-savvy person who likes to work with people
  and teams
- Willing to learn from Senior and Staff Software Engineers
- Owner of your progress as an individual
- You bring 8+ years of software development experience within
  a modern SaaS environment
- You’re proficient in dynamically typed, OOP languages such
  as JavaScript, Python, Ruby or similar languages
- You have 5+ years of practical SQL experience (PostgreSQL
  preferred)
- You’ve worked extensively with cloud platforms (5+ years,
  AWS preferred), enabling scalable and automated
  infrastructure
- You have hands-on experience with ReactJS or similar modern
  front-end frameworks
- You’ve led end-to-end technical projects through all phases
  of the software development lifecycle, and are now looking
  to apply that experience toward building intelligent,
  automated, and AI-enhanced security products
- Must Have:
  - You have strong experience delivering AI-assisted features
    or agentic systems into production (or leading a
    substantial agentic initiative from prototype to
    reliable launch)
  - Experience with agentic architectures (tool use/function
    calling, workflow orchestration, retrieval/RAG, human-
    in-the-loop)
  - Experience with evaluation and data loops (golden sets,
    offline/online evals, experimentation, quality
    dashboards, regression monitoring)
  - You can clearly explain measurable trade-offs you’ve made
    (latency/cost/quality/capacity), and how you used data
    to drive decisions and iteration.

You’re effective in ambiguity: you partner with Product to
clarify scope, surface trade-offs, and avoid custom service
builds that slow teams later.

Preferred Qualifications

- Ruby on Rails
- React JS
- PostgreSQL
- GraphQL
- Amazon Web Services

Employment at HackerOne is contingent on a background check.

Interview Process

- Take home assignmant
- Hiring Manager round
- Challenge / coding round
- Technical / system design round

HackerOne Values

HackerOne commits to maintaining a strong, inclusive culture
built for our employees and our community of security
researchers. We are driven by our five core values. We
recognise that our mission is bigger than us, and therefore,
we act with integrity at all times. As a team, we believe
that transparency builds trust, so we default to disclosure
in our communications. Each individual executes with
excellence, creating an environment of greater alignment and
greater autonomy. We win as a team and respect all people to
empower everyone to learn from each other, innovate, and
grow.

Job Benefits:

- Health (medical, vision, dental), life, and disability
  insurance*
- Equity stock options
- Retirement plans
- Paid public holidays and unlimited PTO
- Paid maternity and parental leave
- Leaves of absence (including caregiver leave and leave under
  CO's Healthy Families and Workplaces Act)
- Employee Assistance Program

*Eligibility may differ by country

We're committed to building a global team! For certain roles
outside the United States, India, the U.K., and the
Netherlands, we partner with Remote.com as our Employer of
Record (EOR).

Visa/work permit sponsorship is not available.

Employment at HackerOne is contingent on a background check.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role explicitly requires hands-on experience delivering
AI-assisted features and agentic systems into production,
including ownership of agentic architecture (tool use,
orchestration, RAG, human-in-the-loop patterns). The
position involves building and deploying intelligent,
automated, AI-enhanced security products - direct hands-on
work with AI/LLM systems.
